sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23761" key="deipnomanh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δειπνο-μᾰνής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n23761.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mad after eating,</tr_> Tim<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0020.tlg002.perseus-grc1:016:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">016.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
